svg.text: All 50+ files, hooks, configs, and references that wire the self-tuning delegation loop together

g.text: Stop + PreToolUse - writes gaps + fitness rows
schema docs (row shape, system field values)
EMA per task_type, writes 3 fitness caches
EMA scores per task_type (V2 Phase 3 output)
coactivation hints injected into delegation prompts
Reads fitness cache, alters routing decisions
The wiring that makes the system fire automatically
pos 11 - delegation-outcome-tracker.py (5s timeout, writes gaps + fitness)
reads -> delegation-fitness.json (fitness-bias on threshold, kill-switch gated)
reads -> trait-fitness.json, lens-fitness.json (bias on personality + lens picks)
paused plan (V2 re-enable gated on this)
Kill-switches (delegation-config.json under mutation_rules): v2_tuning_enabled | v2_canary_mode | exploration_rate=0.10
next UserPromptSubmit - new routing decision feeds back as a new producer row
~10ms write at Stop. EMA recompute at next SessionStart (typically next session boot, < 24h).
